2605.17937.title: BacktestBench: Benchmarking Large Language Models for Automated Quantitative Strategy Backtesting
2605.17937.paper_summary: Quantitative backtesting is essential for evaluating trading strategies but remains hampered by high technical barriers and limited scalability. While Large Language Models (LLMs) offer a transformative path to automate this complex, interdisciplinary workflow through advanced code generation, tool usage, and agentic planning, the practical realization is significantly challenged by the current lack of a large-scale benchmark dedicated to automated quantitative backtesting, which hinders progress in this field. To bridge this critical gap, we introduce BacktestBench, the first large-scale benchmark for automated quantitative backtesting. Built from over 6 million real market records, it comprises 18,246 meticulously annotated question-answering pairs across four task categories: metrics calculation, ticker selection, strategy selection, and parameter confirmation. We also propose AutoBacktest, a robust multi-agent baseline that translates natural language strategies into reproducible backtests by coordinating a Summarizer for semantic factor extraction, a Retriever for validated SQL generation, and a Coder for Python backtesting implementation. Our evaluation on 23 mainstream LLMs, complemented by targeted ablations, identifies key factors that influence end-to-end performance and highlights the importance of grounded verification and standardized indicator representations.
2605.17937.paper_summary_zh: 量化回測對於評估交易策略至關重要，但仍然受到高技術障礙和有限擴展性的困擾。雖然大型語言模型（LLMs）提供了一條變革性途徑，通過先進的代碼生成、工具使用和代理規劃來自動化這一複雜的跨學科工作流程，但目前缺乏專門針對自動化量化回測的大規模基準，這對該領域的進展造成了顯著挑戰。為了填補這一關鍵空白，我們推出了BacktestBench，首個針對自動化量化回測的大規模基準。它基於超過600萬條真實市場記錄，包含18,246對精心註釋的問答對，涵蓋四個任務類別：指標計算、標的選擇、策略選擇和參數確認。我們還提出了AutoBacktest，一個強大的多代理基準，通過協調一個用於語義因子提取的摘要器、一個用於生成驗證SQL的檢索器和一個用於Python回測實現的編碼器，將自然語言策略轉換為可重複的回測。我們對23個主流LLM的評估，輔以針對性的消融實驗，確定了影響端到端性能的關鍵因素，並突出了基於實證的驗證和標準化指標表示的重要性。
2605.17937.author: Zhensheng Wang et.al.
2605.17937.authors: Zhensheng Wang, Wenmian Yang, Qingtai Wu, Lequan Ma, Yiquan Zhang, Weijia Jia
